paper.title: Inflation persistence
paper.journal_or_series: The Quarterly Journal of Economics 110(1), pp. 127-159

title_author_sniff.source_seen: The Quarterly Journal of Economics, Feb., 1995, Vol. 110, No. 1, pp. 127-159

observations: The implementation is declared as model(linear).
Variables include p, x, ytilde, ypsilon, infl, rho, f and modelbase aliases.
Shocks include epsilon_p, epsilon_y, and the MMB policy shock interest_.
The implementation uses f0-f3 contract weights and a relative real contract-price index z = x - p.

uncertain_items: Exact coefficient mapping from the paper's reduced-form VAR/bill-rate block to the MMB policy-rule interface is implementation-side and needs review.
The archive records the appendix alternative p-bar specification for coverage, but the main derivation uses the paper's preferred p_t relative-contracting specification.

runtime_validation.reason: User explicitly requested not to run Dynare; archive task is derivation extraction only.
